description: Regression test baselines for FerroML models. Each entry specifies a model, the synthetic dataset parameters used, the metric to evaluate, and the minimum acceptable value.

baselines.name: LinearRegression
baselines.notes: Closed-form OLS on low-noise linear data should achieve very high R².

baselines.name: RidgeRegression
baselines.notes: Ridge with small alpha on clean data should be close to OLS.

baselines.name: LassoRegression
baselines.notes: Lasso shrinks some coefficients; slightly lower R² than OLS.

baselines.name: ElasticNet
baselines.notes: ElasticNet combines L1+L2; performance between Ridge and Lasso.

baselines.name: DecisionTreeRegressor
baselines.notes: Decision tree on training data should fit well even with noise.

baselines.name: RandomForestRegressor
baselines.notes: Random forest should generalize better than single tree.

baselines.name: GradientBoostingRegressor
baselines.notes: Gradient boosting on clean regression data.

baselines.name: KNeighborsRegressor
baselines.notes: KNN regression with k=5 on moderately noisy data.

baselines.name: ExtraTreesRegressor
baselines.notes: Extra trees should perform similarly to random forest.

baselines.name: HistGradientBoostingRegressor
baselines.notes: Histogram-based gradient boosting on regression data.

baselines.name: LogisticRegression
baselines.notes: Logistic regression on well-separated binary data.

baselines.name: DecisionTreeClassifier
baselines.notes: Decision tree should perfectly or near-perfectly fit training data.

baselines.name: RandomForestClassifier
baselines.notes: Random forest on well-separated clusters.

baselines.name: GradientBoostingClassifier
baselines.notes: Gradient boosting classifier on binary data.

baselines.name: KNeighborsClassifier
baselines.notes: KNN with k=5 on well-separated clusters.

baselines.name: GaussianNB
baselines.notes: Gaussian Naive Bayes on synthetic data with feature independence.

baselines.name: ExtraTreesClassifier
baselines.notes: Extra trees classifier on well-separated data.

baselines.name: AdaBoostClassifier
baselines.notes: AdaBoost with 50 estimators on binary classification.

baselines.name: SGDClassifier
baselines.notes: SGD classifier — linear model, may underperform on harder boundaries.

baselines.name: LinearSVC
baselines.notes: Linear SVM classifier on well-separated data.
